debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
x : ℝ
hxge : x ≥ ↑n
hxlt : x < ↑n + 1
⊢ Real.log x ≤ ∑ k ∈ Icc 1 n, (↑k)⁻¹

failed_attempts:
suffices Real.log (n + 1) ≤ ∑ k ∈ Icc 1 n, (k : ℝ)⁻¹ by
          obtain hx | hx := le_or_gt x 0
          · rw [Real.log_of_nonpos hx]
            exact sum_nonneg fun i _ => inv_nonneg.mpr (Nat.cast_nonneg i)
          · exact (Real.log_le_log hx (by linarith)).trans this
        induction n with
        | zero => simp
        | succ n ih =>
          rw [sum_Icc_succ_top (Nat.succ_le_succ n.zero_le), Nat.cast_succ, ← add_comm]
          have h : 0 < (n : ℝ) + 1 := by exact_mod_cast n.succ_pos
          rw [← Real.log_mul (by linarith) (by positivity), mul_add, mul_one, mul_inv_cancel h.ne.symm]
          exact add_le_add ih (Real.log_add_one_le (inv_pos.mpr h).le)

rw [sum_Icc_eq_sum_range]
        simp only [add_comm]
      _ ≤ primeCountingReal x + 1 := by sorry
  sorry

trans Real.log (n + 1)
        · rcases le_or_lt x 0 with h | h
          · rw [Real.log_of_le h]; positivity
          · exact Real.log_le_log h (le_of_lt hxlt)
        · induction n with
          | zero => simp
          | succ n hn =>
            rw [sum_Icc_succ_top (by simp), Nat.cast_succ]
            have : Real.log (n + 2) - Real.log (n + 1) ≤ (n + 1)⁻¹ := by
              rw [← Real.log_div (by positivity) (by positivity)]
              refine (Real.log_le_sub_one_of_pos (by positivity)).trans_eq ?_
              rw [div_eq_iff (by positivity)]; ring
            linarith

rcases n.eq_zero_or_pos with rfl | hn
        · simp
          exact Real.log_le_zero_of_le_one (le_of_lt hxlt)
        · calc
            Real.log x ≤ Real.log (n + 1) := Real.log_le_log (lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.cast_pos.mpr hn) hxge) (le_of_lt hxlt)
            _ = ∑ k ∈ Icc 1 n, (Real.log (k + 1) - Real.log k) := by
              rw [Nat.Icc_eq_Ico, Finset.sum_Ico_succ_sub (fun x ↦ Real.log x), Real.log_one, sub_zero]
              norm_cast
            _ ≤ ∑ k ∈ Icc 1 n, (k : ℝ)⁻¹ := by
              refine sum_le_sum fun k hk ↦ ?_
              have : (0 : ℝ) < k := Nat.cast_pos.mpr (mem_Icc.mp hk).1
              rw [← Real.log_div (by linarith) (by linarith), div_eq_add_one_div_of_ne_zero_left (by linarith)]
              exact Real.log_add_one_le_self _

trans Real.log (n + 1)
        · obtain hx | hx := le_or_lt x 0
          · rw [Real.log_of_nonpos hx]
            exact Real.log_nonneg (by norm_cast; omega)
          · exact Real.log_le_log hx (by linarith)
        · rw [Finset.sum_Icc_sub (fun x ↦ Real.log x) (by omega), Real.log_one, sub_zero]
          refine Finset.sum_le_sum fun k hk ↦ ?_
          rw [mem_Icc] at hk
          have : 0 < (k : ℝ) := by norm_cast; linarith
          rw [sub_le_iff_le_add, ← Real.log_mul (by linarith) (by linarith),

          exact Real.log_one_add_le (by rw [inv_pos]; linarith)

        · simp only [Icc_eq_empty_of_lt one_pos, sum_empty, cast_zero, zero_add] at *
          obtain hx | hx := le_or_lt x 0

            rw [sum_Icc_succ_top (by linarith), ← Nat.cast_succ]
            refine le_trans ?_ (add_le_add_right hn _)
            rw [← sub_le_iff_le_add, ← Real.log_div (by linarith) (by linarith)]
            convert Real.log_le_sub_one_of_pos (by linarith)
            field_simp

rcases n.eq_zero_or_pos with rfl | hn
        · simp at hxlt ⊢
          by_cases hx : x ≤ 0
          · rw [Real.log_of_nonpos hx]
          · exact Real.log_le_zero_of_le_one (not_le.mp hx) (le_of_lt hxlt)
        · calc Real.log x ≤ Real.log (n + 1) := Real.log_le_log (by linarith) (by linarith)
            _ = ∑ i ∈ range n, (Real.log (i + 1 + 1) - Real.log (i + 1)) := by
              rw [sum_range_sub, Real.log_one, sub_zero]
            _ = ∑ k ∈ Icc 1 n, (Real.log (k + 1) - Real.log k) := by
              rw [range_eq_Ico, ← sum_Ico_add]
              congr
            _ ≤ ∑ k ∈ Icc 1 n, (k : ℝ)⁻¹ := by
              gcongr with k hk
              rw [mem_Icc] at hk
              have : 0 < (k : ℝ) := Nat.cast_pos.mpr hk.1
              rw [sub_le_iff_le_add, ← Real.log_mul (by linarith) (by linarith), mul_comm,
                ← one_add_mul, mul_inv_cancel (by linarith)]
              exact Real.log_one_add_le _

calc
          Real.log x ≤ Real.log (n + 1) := by
            rcases le_or_lt x 0 with hx | hx
            · rw [Real.log_of_nonpos hx]
              exact Real.log_nonneg (by norm_cast; omega)
            · exact Real.log_le_log hx (by linarith)
          _ = ∑ i in range n, (Real.log (i + 2) - Real.log (i + 1)) := by
            rw [sum_range_sub, Real.log_one, sub_zero]; norm_cast
          _ ≤ ∑ i in range n, ((i : ℝ) + 1)⁻¹ := by
            apply sum_le_sum; intro i _
            rw [← Real.log_div (by linarith) (by linarith)]
            have : ((i : ℝ) + 2) / (i + 1) = 1 + (i + 1)⁻¹ := by field_simp
            rw [this]
            apply Real.log_one_add_le
            apply lt_trans (y:=0) (by norm_num)
            apply inv_pos.mpr
            norm_cast; linarith
          _ = ∑ k in Icc 1 n, (k : ℝ)⁻¹ := by
            rw [sum_Icc_eq_sum_range]; congr; ext; push_cast; ring
